data.title: Dreame Nebula NEXT Auto expands academic collaboration to accelerate AI-driven automotive innovation
data.description: In Berkeley, California, on April 22, 2026, Dreame Nebula NEXT Auto has strengthened its relationship with UC Berkeley, highlighting a significant long-term investment in autonomous systems and engineering expertise. This collaboration underscores the company's commitment to intelligent vehicle development. This engagement signifies a substantial step forward in fostering innovation and research in this field. The partnership with UC Berkeley showcases the company's dedication to advancing technology and expertise in autonomous systems. This alliance demonstrates Dreame Nebula NEXT Auto's focus on driving innovation and growth in the area of intelligent vehicle development.

data.title: Homestyler AIDA Global AI Design Awards to Open in Milan
data.description: The Homestyler AIDA Global AI Design Awards Ceremony is scheduled to commence on the morning of April 23 in Milan, Italy. This event, taking place at the ADI Design Museum, will feature 170 award-winning projects and the latest advancements in AI technology. It will serve as a platform to showcase innovative designs and how AI is revolutionizing the field, with participants from various countries expected to attend.

data.title: Ant Group Unveils Ling-2.6-Flash: A Major Leap in AI Efficiency
data.description: In Hangzhou, China, Ant Group has introduced Ling-2.6-flash, a cutting-edge large language model focused on efficiency and practical use. This new model employs a sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) structure and boasts an impressive 104 billion total parameters, with only 7.4 billion in active use. As a result, it provides advanced intelligence capabilities at a significantly reduced cost and latency compared to similar models. Ling-2.6-flash sets itself apart by not relying on generating an abundance of tokens to enhance performance, offering a more streamlined approach to achieving higher benchmarks.

data.title: Tech Mahindra Named 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year in Services & Industry Solutions: Manufacturing
data.description: In Pune, India, on April 22, 2026, Tech Mahindra, a prominent technology consulting and digital solutions provider for enterprises in various sectors, revealed that it has been recognized as the 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year for Services & Industry Solutions. Tech Mahindra, listed as NSE: TECHM, secured this prestigious title for its exceptional performance in the field.

data.title: EZVIZ joins the United Nations Global Compact, starting a new chapter of its unwavering journey to long-term sustainability and further expanding its contribution to key environmental issues
data.description: In Hoofddorp, Netherlands, on April 22, 2026, EZVIZ, a company promoting eco-friendly smart homes, publicized its involvement in the United Nations Global Compact during the International Year of Volunteers for Sustainable Development. This announcement was made on Earth Day to emphasize the company's commitment to sustainability.

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING DDC Chairwoman's Letter: Record FY2025, 2,383 BTC, and an AI Operating System Built for Bitcoin Treasuries
data.description: In a recent update dated April 21, 2026, it was reported that core sales and marketing expenses decreased by 54%, while general and administrative expenses saw a decline of 44.4%. The revised release highlights DDC Enterprise's achievements in fiscal year 2025, including doubling Bitcoin holdings to 2,383 BTC, leading to a top-30 global ranking. Additionally, the company launched an AI operating system tailored for efficient Bitcoin treasury management. These developments were emphasized in the DDC Chairwoman's letter.

data.title: CleanMyMac by MacPaw Report: 7 in 10 Mac Users Would Clean Cloud Storage More Often If They Knew Its Environmental Cost
data.description: In honor of Earth Day, MacPaw conducted a survey of 1,000 Mac users to explore their digital habits, emotional clutter, and the potential impact of environmental awareness on cleanup behavior. The global technology company based in KYIV, Ukraine, aims to reshape user behavior in alignment with environmental sustainability. This initiative reflects a growing trend towards integrating eco-consciousness into everyday tech usage.
